nodes.label: Iranian missile strikes on commercial vessels
Suspension of shipping operations through the Strait of Hormuz
COSCO Shipping suspends new bookings for Middle East routes
Israel orders evacuation across parts of southern Lebanon amid Hezbollah hostili
Hackers hit Iranian apps and websites after U.S.-Israeli strikes

edges.label: supply_chokepoint
edges.why: Carrier suspensions/traffic restrictions at a key crude/LNG chokepoint raise expected near-term supply tightness and war-risk premia.

edges.label: escalation_drives_risk_off
edges.why: Direct attacks on commercial shipping increase tail risk of broader conflict and can trigger equity de-risking and volatility.

edges.label: logistics_shock
edges.why: Freight/insurance cost inflation and trade delays can pressure margins and financing conditions for transport/logistics and exposed corporates.

edges.label: second_front
edges.why: A widening Israel-Hezbollah conflict adds a second active front, raising regional escalation risk.

edges.label: terms_of_trade_shock
edges.why: Higher delivered energy costs typically pressure EM importer currencies via worsened trade balances and inflation expectations.
